languages.text: "У-у-увечья — пр... признак слабости духа! Слаб! Слаб!" {n}Юноша замирает, после чего начинает биться о палубу с удвоенной силой, что-то нечленораздельно вопя.{/n} "Се-е-ердце... в трубе! Ру-руки отдали крысам..."

"L-l-lameness shows w-weakness of spirit! Weak! Weak!" {n}He freezes, then begins smashing his head against the deck with redoubled force, screaming in broken words:{/n} "My heart... is down there... in the shaft! They gave... my hands... to the rrrrats..."
languages.original_text: "У-у-увечья — пр... признак слабости духа! Слаб! Слаб!" {n}Юноша замирает, после чего начинает биться о палубу с удвоенной силой, что-то нечленораздельно вопя.{/n} "Се-е-ердце... в трубе! Ру-руки отдали крысам..."

traits.locale_text: "L-l-lameness shows w-weakness of spirit! Weak! Weak!" {n}He freezes, then begins smashing his head against the deck with redoubled force, screaming in broken words:{/n} "My heart... is down there... in the shaft! They gave... my hands... to the rrrrats..."

"L-l-lameness shows w-weakness of spirit! Weak! Weak!" {n}He freezes, then begins smashing his head against the deck with redoubled force, screaming in broken words:{/n} "My heart... is down there... in the shaft! They gave... my hands... to the rrrrats..."
"L-l-lameness shows w-weakness of spirit! Weak! Weak! I don't deserve... They forgot my heart down there in the shaft! They gave my hands... to the rats..."

"L-l-lameness shows w-weakness of spirit! Weak! Weak!" {n}He freezes, then begins smashing his head against the deck with redoubled force, screaming in broken words:{/n} "My heart... is down there... in the shaft! They gave... my hands... to the rrrrats..."

"L-l-lameness shows w-weakness of spirit! Weak! Weak!" {n}He freezes, then begins smashing his head against the deck with redoubled force, screaming in broken words:{/n} "My heart... is down there... in the shaft! They gave... my hands... to the rrrrats..."

languages.text: 「弱さは精神の弱さ！私は弱く、弱く！私は良くなる資格はない。だから心はシャフトに忘れられ、手はネズミに与えられたのだ…」
languages.original_text: "Lameness shows weakness of spirit! I'm weak, I'm weak! I don't deserve to feel better, that's why my heart was forgotten in the shaft, and my hands were given to the rats..."

traits.locale_text: 「弱さは精神の弱さ！私は弱く、弱く！私は良くなる資格はない。だから心はシャフトに忘れられ、手はネズミに与えられたのだ…」

languages.text: “跛——跛行说明精神软弱！软弱！软弱！”{n}他先是僵住，随后开始加倍用力地拿头猛撞甲板，发出支离破碎的嘶喊：{/n}“我的心脏……在下面……在竖井里！他们把……我的手……给了老老老鼠……”
languages.original_text: "L-l-lameness shows w-weakness of spirit! Weak! Weak!" {n}He freezes, then begins smashing his head against the deck with redoubled force, screaming in broken words:{/n} "My heart... is down there... in the shaft! They gave... my hands... to the rrrrats..."

traits.locale_text: “跛——跛行说明精神软弱！软弱！软弱！”{n}他先是僵住，随后开始加倍用力地拿头猛撞甲板，发出支离破碎的嘶喊：{/n}“我的心脏……在下面……在竖井里！他们把……我的手……给了老老老鼠……”

languages.text: « L-la faiblesse du corps est aussi celle d-de l'esprit ! Faible ! Faible ! » {n}Il se fige, puis commence à se frapper la tête contre le pont avec une force redoublée, hurlant des propos décousus :{/n} « Mon cœur... Il est en bas, dans le conduit... Ils ont jeté mes mains en pâture aux rrrats ! »
languages.original_text: "L-l-lameness shows w-weakness of spirit! Weak! Weak!" {n}He freezes, then begins smashing his head against the deck with redoubled force, screaming in broken words:{/n} "My heart... is down there... in the shaft! They gave... my hands... to the rrrrats..."

traits.locale_text: « L-la faiblesse du corps est aussi celle d-de l'esprit ! Faible ! Faible ! » {n}Il se fige, puis commence à se frapper la tête contre le pont avec une force redoublée, hurlant des propos décousus :{/n} « Mon cœur... Il est en bas, dans le conduit... Ils ont jeté mes mains en pâture aux rrrats ! »

languages.text: «La... parálisis es muestra de un espíritu débil. ¡Débil! ¡Débil!». {n}Se detiene y empieza a dar cabezazos contra la cubierta, gritando frases a medio formar:{/n} «Mi corazón... abajo... ¡en el conducto! Dieron... mis manos... a las rrratas...».
languages.original_text: "L-l-lameness shows w-weakness of spirit! Weak! Weak!" {n}He freezes, then begins smashing his head against the deck with redoubled force, screaming in broken words:{/n} "My heart... is down there... in the shaft! They gave... my hands... to the rrrrats..."

traits.locale_text: «La... parálisis es muestra de un espíritu débil. ¡Débil! ¡Débil!». {n}Se detiene y empieza a dar cabezazos contra la cubierta, gritando frases a medio formar:{/n} «Mi corazón... abajo... ¡en el conducto! Dieron... mis manos... a las rrratas...».

languages.text: "To... Topallık ru... Ruhun zayıflığını gösterir! Zayıf! Zayıf!" {n}Donup kalıyor, ardından iki kat güçle kafasını güverteye vurmaya başlıyor ve kesik kesik kelimelerle çığlık atıyor.{/n} "Kalbim... Aşağıda... Şaftta! Ellerimi... Farelere... Verdiler..."
languages.original_text: "L-l-lameness shows w-weakness of spirit! Weak! Weak!" {n}He freezes, then begins smashing his head against the deck with redoubled force, screaming in broken words:{/n} "My heart... is down there... in the shaft! They gave... my hands... to the rrrrats..."

traits.locale_text: "To... Topallık ru... Ruhun zayıflığını gösterir! Zayıf! Zayıf!" {n}Donup kalıyor, ardından iki kat güçle kafasını güverteye vurmaya başlıyor ve kesik kesik kelimelerle çığlık atıyor.{/n} "Kalbim... Aşağıda... Şaftta! Ellerimi... Farelere... Verdiler..."

languages.text: "U-Untätigkeit ist eine Sch-Schwäche des Geistes! Schwach! Schwach!" {n}Er erstarrt, ehe er seinen Kopf noch heftiger auf den Boden schlägt und brüllt:{/n} "Mein Herz ... ist dort unten ... in dem Schacht! Sie gaben ... meine Hände ... den Rrrratten ..."
languages.original_text: "L-l-lameness shows w-weakness of spirit! Weak! Weak!" {n}He freezes, then begins smashing his head against the deck with redoubled force, screaming in broken words:{/n} "My heart... is down there... in the shaft! They gave... my hands... to the rrrrats..."
